summary: Focana 2.4.1 makes saved work easier to pick back up and Pomodoro breaks harder to miss.
improvements: The visible saved-work surface is now To-Do, focused on resumable work instead of a full session log.
Completed and discarded sessions remain recoverable through Session records without taking over the first view.
Pomodoro work completion now asks for a short break plan before the break countdown starts.
Pomodoro break completion now waits on a Ready to resume screen instead of automatically starting the next focus interval.
fixes: Re-entry prompts, floating prompts, Settings, and the tray now use consistent To-Do language for saved work.
Pomodoro break handoff state now persists through reloads so the user is not stranded mid-transition.
